issues.description: Condition checks HasCardOnBoard but card text states 'If your Leader has the {Red-Haired Pirates} type' — should use LeaderHasType condition, not HasCardOnBoard
TrashFromHand action should be optional (preceded by 'You may') — needs optional:true wrapper or conditional structure
KO action target should specify 'base power' explicitly in DSL if supported; current target definition lacks power type specification
